transcript.clean_text: time for all day at parinice stage four and an opportunity to visit the birthplace of julian anna philippe the french world champion who isn't riding at this race but is over in italy preparing for the rest of the season rowan dennis set the early time bettering thomas again by a minute and one second the australian time trial champion running for yumbo visma the former two-time world champion just ahead of stefan kung current european jersey holder he finished four seconds down it was a course that went up and down with a really difficult climb to the finish and when simon yates went through the intermediate time check over what was supposed to be the easiest part of the course quicker than rowan dennis everybody thought he may well win the stage yates though finished just under five seconds down one of the best time trials he's put up in a few years primogenics the olympic time trial champion and a man hoping to win this race for the first time he started off well predictably well mr consistent in this discipline but what fun art time trial winner at the tour de france last year was also hoping to beat his teammate it's been all jumbo visma so far this week christophe laporte had been in the yellow jersey and primary glitch was going well just under six seconds worse off than yates at the time cheque laporte was really battling to try and hold on to his slender one second lead of avenatt in the general classification but bernard himself was on a mission close to yates closer than anybody else in fact just point one four seconds down that's pivoting who won stage three also put in a real battling performance he was good enough for seventh that was before premarch roglich turned up ron dennis had sat all afternoon long in the hot seat his 16-26 finally beaten but have been happy at least that it was a teammate who knocked him off the throne roglick four seconds quicker then but then came wildfernat he in turn quicker than his slovenian star and while the belgian becoming the first belgian to win a time trial in pacinis since the late frank von brook in 1999. laporte will finish just under half a minute down he'd lose the yellow jersey but he'd hand it over to watford art winner of the stage and another jumbo visma one two three fernat roglic and dennis the second time this week that they topped the top of the standings they continued to top the general standings one two and three there with walfone art when the yellow jersey again another belgian record going the first belgian to wear the bahini's leaders jersey since domestic kent in 2011.
